name_en: Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
M46740
SAUMUR BB Handbag
Exclusive channel goods, Gemini launch exclusive, pure original quilted fabric + real hardware assembly, European ZP surplus stock
The Saumur BB Handbag is crafted from Monogram canvas, reinterpreting a beloved classic design with a contemporary touch. The saddle bag silhouette and calfskin buckle embody a knightly spirit, while the hidden magnetic closure on the front ensures easy opening. Its compact structure accommodates daily essentials, and the detachable shoulder strap and handle offer versatile carrying options.
Detailed Features
20 x 16 x 7.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
Monogram Coated Canvas
Calfskin Trim
Microfiber Lining
Hardware
Calfskin buckle and magnetic closure
Side buckle
Back patch pocket
Strap: Detachable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 44.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 51.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, detachable
Includes exclusive high-end ZP packaging
